task.title: Trim oversized system docs
task.summary: Reduce oversized CodeWiki system docs below lint warning thresholds without changing behavior or roadmap semantics.

goal.outcome: System knowledge docs no longer trigger large-doc warnings while preserving canonical build and roadmap policy.
acceptance: .codewiki/kb/system/builds.md no longer triggers large-doc lint warning.
.codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md no longer triggers large-doc lint warning.
No build lifecycle, traceability, task-boundary, or sprint semantics are removed.
Generated graph/lint state is refreshed and passes alignment/generated-parity checks.
non_goals: Do not rewrite docs beyond size-focused consolidation.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Trimmed oversized builds and roadmap system docs below large-doc warning threshold while preserving policy semantics.

evidence: No code tests added; documentation size cleanup verified through graph lint/audit and full npm test.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: No code tests added; documentation size cleanup verified through graph lint/audit and full npm test.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: .codewiki/kb/system/builds.md no longer triggers large-doc lint warning.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Rebuilt graph reports health green, warnings 0; lint warnings empty.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: .codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md no longer triggers large-doc lint warning.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Rebuilt graph reports health green, warnings 0; lint warnings empty.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: No build lifecycle, traceability, task-boundary, or sprint semantics are removed.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Docs retain build lifecycle/consumption, change_type/traceability, task boundary, sprint, retention, closure, and generated-view contracts in concise form.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Generated graph/lint state is refreshed and passes alignment/generated-parity checks.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph rebuild completed; audit alignment/generated-parity pass; npm test passed.

closure_brief.user_intent: Remove remaining large-doc warnings for full green CodeWiki health.
acceptance_evidence: Graph health green with 0 warnings after rebuild.
non_goals_preserved: No broad doc rewrite beyond size-focused consolidation.
remaining_risks: Condensed prose may be less explanatory but keeps canonical rules.

risks: Condensed prose may be less explanatory but keeps canonical rules.
